summary: All three features (P0, P2, P3) tested and working correctly. P0: SMS OTP verification via Infobip - phone signup triggers OTP, verification screen appears with countdown timer, verify/resend buttons work. P2: Advanced Ratings Reports - Reports tab shows analytics with charts (trends, category breakdown), response rates, flagged reviews analysis. P3: CustomerServiceManagement refactored - Dashboard, Tickets, Team tabs all functional with extracted components.

minor.issue: Mixed content warning - HTTP request blocked on HTTPS page (non-critical, notifications still work)

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts still render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0, P2, P3 features verified working. P0 SMS OTP: POST /api/otp/send and /api/otp/verify endpoints work with Infobip integration (real credentials). Phone signup flow shows OTP verification screen with 6-digit input, countdown timer, resend button. P2 Ratings Reports: GET /api/ratings/reports/analytics returns summary, trends, by_category, flagged_analysis, top_operators data. Reports tab on /ratings page shows charts and tables. P3 CustomerServiceManagement: Refactored to use extracted components (DashboardTab, TeamTab, etc.) - all tabs (Dashboard, Tickets, Team) work correctly at /management/customer-service.

P0_OTP_verify.details: Rejects invalid codes with attempts remaining message

P0_OTP_UI_flow.test: Phone signup triggers OTP verification screen
P0_OTP_UI_flow.details: Shows 'Verify Your Phone' with 6-digit input, countdown timer, resend button

P2_analytics_endpoint.details: Returns summary, trends, by_category, flagged_analysis, top_operators

P2_reports_tab_UI.test: Reports tab shows charts and analytics
P2_reports_tab_UI.details: Rating Trends chart, Reviews by Category pie chart, Service Category Breakdown table visible

P3_dashboard_tab.test: Dashboard tab shows ticket stats and charts
P3_dashboard_tab.details: Total Tickets, Open, In Progress, Unassigned stats; Tickets by Category/Status charts; Team Workload

P3_tickets_tab.test: Tickets tab shows ticket list with filters
P3_tickets_tab.details: Open/In Progress/Closed filters, search, ticket cards with assign button

P3_team_tab.details: Support Team (4 members), Add Member button, role badges
